'''''Star Wars'' 4''' is the fourth issue in the ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' series of comics. It was published on [[March 17]], [[1999]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Sylvn and the fugitives have taken flight from Cerea, but their starship's cargo hold is fit to burst with a load of unstoppable alien beasts. Action was what the youngsters hoped to find in the space lanes beyond their provincial homeworld, but now they have more than they bargained for, and a trial back home to face the consequences of their actions is beginning to sound downright cozy!''

==Plot summary==
After escaping Cerea, [[Ephant Mon/Legends|Ephant Mon]] and the [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] children are quarantined above [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], because of the ravenous [[Divvik]]s loose on board their ship. Meanwhile, pro-Republic sentiment grows on Cerea in the wake of the investigation. Because of the severity of the situation, [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]] is brought out of [[Bacta/Legends|Bacta]] healing early and sent to Tatooine to recover the fugitives, with a crew of hastily cobbled together droids.
